title: Deadline automations
excerpt: Currently, if you set a deadline with a date and a time for an automation, it will only remember the date and will not keep the time of the deadline if you want the automation to repeat and push deadline back a day when …

posts.author: Doughty94 (Darrin Doughty)
posts.cookedHtml:
Currently, if you set a deadline with a date and a time for an automation, it will only remember the date and will not keep the time of the deadline if you want the automation to repeat and push deadline back a day when a status is changed.

For example, I have deadlines for tasks to be completed daily. I need these task done by a specific time and date.

If i set the dead line as today at 10am, when the end of the day arrives and resets the task status and deadline, it only resets the date rather than the time. So the deadline will now say today (without a time) I would like this to be added. Very needed.
